text: BTC looking ready for a breakout above $42,000. RSI oversold on the 4h chart with bullish divergence. MACD about to cross bullish. Entry at $41,800, stop loss at $40,500, take profit at $45,000. This is the setup I've been waiting for.
chart_description: 4-hour BTCUSDT chart showing price consolidating in an ascending triangle pattern. Support trendline connecting higher lows from $38,000 to $41,500. Horizontal resistance at $42,000 tested 3 times. RSI at 32 showing bullish divergence (price making higher lows while RSI made lower lows). MACD histogram turning positive. Volume increasing on recent green candles.
author: CryptoTrader99
